svg.title: SciModelingBench materials discovery tasks, rectangular photographs
svg.desc: A scientific montage of superconductor composition ranking and context-aware DrugMatrix response ranking.
svg.metadata: YBCO lattice and Meissner-effect photograph: Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA. Sprague-Dawley rat photograph: Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 2.0. Molecular depictions were generated with RDKit from the official DrugMatrix curated SMILES file. The 86-channel composition vector is original artwork.

text.tspan: superconducting Tc ranking and measured rat toxicology-response ranking.
